error_signature: Unused Respond to Webhook node found in the workflow
title: Webhook node not configured correctly
symptom: When calling the localhost webhook URL, n8n throws 'Unused Respond to Webhook node found in the workflow'. The same workflow works without errors when using a tunnel URL.
not_this_if: Webhook works fine with a tunnel URL
root_cause: The Webhook node must be configured to use the 'Respond to Webhook' node for the response. If this setting is not enabled, n8n cannot properly handle the response, leading to the error message.
fix_steps: Set the 'Response mode' option to 'Using Respond to Webhook Node'
Test the webhook again from localhost
agent_instruction: Configure the Webhook node to use the 'Respond to Webhook' node and save the changes.
